title: eulophus cuspidatus
intro: Eulophus cuspidatus is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as the 'butterfly orchid', which belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Eulophus cuspidatus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to soothe wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be administered internally or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
